title: astelia trinervia
intro: Astelia trinervia, also known as the New Zealand astelia or Wire rush, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Astelia trinervia include treating skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
